objective: Test if the newer K2.7 model has the same subagent failure as K2.6
description: Run the same counting task (50,000) with K2.7 to see if the CommandLaneTaskTimeoutError is specific to K2.6 or affects all Kimi models.

spawn_configs.task: Count from 1 to 50000, return the last number. Do this by iterating in Python.

detect.model_specific: If K2.7 passes, the issue is specific to K2.6
